title: Glyphid Spiders
description: Makes spiders look like glyphid grunts from the game Deep Rock Galactic.
body:
# Glyphid Spiders
Glyphid spiders does exactly what it sounds like, it changes minecraft's spiders appearence to look like the Glyphid grunts from **Deep Rock Galactic**.

**OPTFINE REQUIRED**

![Close view of the glyphid model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SlqoVWJS/images/0a945637d2ccb0cf55fa8cabbc0601c0c230014d.png)

**Works with Nyf's Spiders mod!**

![Screenshot of various spiders with the glyphid model from the texture pack with Nyf's Spiders mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SlqoVWJS/images/79aa6e39a6c9c8f0bf3349f464a38fe48750f908.png)

**USAGE**

Feel free to include this resource pack in your mod pack or make youtube content with it, just make sure to credit with the link and name of this project!

# DISCLAIMER!
I do not have any affiliation with Ghost Ship Games, this resource pack is solely made for fun as a form of homage to Deep Rock Galactic!
